programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries
programme.desc: When Jennifer's friend and self-storage facility owner Martin turns up murdered just hours after auctioning off an abandoned storage unit full of unique items to Jennifer, she is immediately pulled on the case as a key eyewitness.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Things look bad when a married woman's keys are found by the body in a motel room, and she can't explain why.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the reappearance of an heir who had been missing for over 20 years.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica poses as a wealthy patient to probe the murder of a vagabond identified as the hospital's accountant.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates a murder which coincides with Doc Hazlitt's sighting of a 17th-century witch.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is detained and accused of espionage while attending an international writers conference in Moscow.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Things look bad when a married woman's keys are found by the body in a motel room, and she can't explain why.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the reappearance of an heir who had been missing for over 20 years.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica poses as a wealthy patient to probe the murder of a vagabond identified as the hospital's accountant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Cinnamon Carter (Barbara Bain) comes out of retirement to protect Jesse's father (Robert Culp), a former CIA agent.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.sub-title: A Mime Is a Terrible Thing to Waste
programme.desc: The death of a mime leads federal and local authorities to the conclusion that Mark and Steve are involved in an illegal auto-parts ring.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: During the making of a dirt bike video, the star rider is found dead, and Mark must track down the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A patient and a nurse are both murdered as the hospital staff scrambles to deal with casualties from a collapsed tunnel.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire leads Laura and Remington to Malta where they compete against each other to find a kidnapped writer.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Dorothy Lamour, Virginia Mayo and Lloyd Nolan ask the agency to find the culprit behind several attacks disguised as accidents.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Singing-telegram messengers move in with Laura for protection after mistakenly delivering a message during a murder in progress.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: "Retired" Ben returns from fishing to find a young immigrant farmhand dead and a town unfriendly to questions.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: "Retired" Ben returns from fishing to find a young immigrant farmhand dead and a town unfriendly to questions.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Michelle is kidnapped by mobsters who offer her release in exchange for evidence Ben was given prior to a mob lawyer's murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A TV reporter is framed for his producer's murder, a smoke screen for a real estate scam and fictitious news story.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Conrad makes a surprising discovery relating to a real estate scam after he infiltrates a street gang.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries
programme.desc: When crime reporter Ruby Herring receives clues to a murder that happened five years earlier involving a local psychic, she joins forces with Detective Jake Killian to help crack the case.

programme.title: Mystery Island
programme.desc: Contest winners try to solve a fake murder for a grand prize, but the event goes awry when a real murder occurs and secrets are uncovered.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A former sorority sister asks Jessica's help in clearing the name of a respected college professor who has confessed to murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica encounters murder when car trouble strands her and a fellow writer at a run-down truck stop owned by a disillusioned woman.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's former student publishes a tell-all novel with characters resembling Cabot Cove residents, but when a murder occurs that follows the book's plot, Jessica gets involved.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica must find the truth when murder befalls a young writer she had recommended to edit a dead author's last novel.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: In Boston Jessica calls on private detective Harry McGraw after running into an old friend who denies knowing her.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A former sorority sister asks Jessica's help in clearing the name of a respected college professor who has confessed to murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica encounters murder when car trouble strands her and a fellow writer at a run-down truck stop owned by a disillusioned woman.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's former student publishes a tell-all novel with characters resembling Cabot Cove residents, but when a murder occurs that follows the book's plot, Jessica gets involved.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark is convicted and sentenced to death for the murder of a mob boss suspected of gunning down Detective Steve Sloan.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve (Barry Van Dyke) recovers and is determined to find out who framed Mark (Dick Van Dyke) and started a mob war. Guest star: Fred Dryer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda (Dick Van Dyke, Victoria Rowell) unexpectedly find themselves in the middle of a triple murder at a friend's (guest star Adrienne Barbeau) house.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark negotiates the release of several pregnant women who have been taken hostage during their childbirth class by a man unable to have children.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: After a member's sudden death, a mystery writers organization hires the pair to find an embezzled $1 million.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Remington and Laura sink their teeth into the disappearance of a threatened restaurant critic.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura risks arrest to vindicate the actor (Conrad Janis) who played her hero, Atomic Man, charged with murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben and his visiting daughter believe there is a connection between Ben's client and the assassination of Atlanta's mayor.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben and his visiting daughter believe there is a connection between Ben's client and the assassination of Atlanta's mayor.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A woman is accused of murdering her estranged boyfriend; her imaginative son creates a comic book with parallels to the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is drawn into a murder investigation while vacationing with his daughter at an exclusive seaside resort.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is drawn into a murder investigation while vacationing with his daughter at an exclusive seaside resort.

programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries
programme.desc: When Dahlia's boyfriend is found dead, advice columnist Nelly joins Detective Hogan to help find the killer. However, as suspicions creep in, Dahlia becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: All Manners of Murder
programme.desc: Advice columnist Nelly is invited to a lavish dinner at Grand Arlott manor after encouraging an eccentric widow to reconcile with her estranged family and brings Detective Michael as her date.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when her the friend (Tim Dunigan) of her nephew (Todd Bryant) is accused of murdering a female sportscaster.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A jealous mystery-writer (Jean Simmons) creates havoc for Jessica when her own publisher tells her that her work is slipping.
